module_info.docstring: Tests for delta context CLI functionality.

classes.name: TestDeltaContextCLI
classes.docstring: Tests for CLI delta context functionality.

methods.name: test_context_with_session_id_first_call
methods.docstring: First call with session_id should include full code.

methods.name: test_context_with_session_id_second_call
methods.docstring: Second call with same session_id should mark unchanged symbols.

methods.name: test_context_no_delta_disables_caching
methods.docstring: --no-delta should disable delta mode even with session-id.

methods.name: test_context_after_file_change
methods.docstring: After file change, symbols should be marked as changed.

classes.name: TestDeltaContextStateStore
classes.docstring: Direct tests for StateStore delta functionality.

methods.name: test_check_delta_no_prior_delivery
methods.docstring: check_delta with no prior delivery marks all as changed.

methods.name: test_check_delta_with_prior_delivery
methods.docstring: check_delta with prior delivery marks matching etags as unchanged.

methods.name: test_check_delta_etag_mismatch
methods.docstring: check_delta marks symbols with changed etags as changed.

methods.name: test_build_context_pack_delta_all_changed
methods.docstring: Delta pack with all changed symbols includes full code.

methods.name: test_build_context_pack_delta_all_unchanged
methods.docstring: Delta pack with all unchanged symbols omits code.

methods.name: test_build_context_pack_delta_mixed
methods.docstring: Delta pack with mixed symbols handles both correctly.

classes.name: TestDiffContextDelta
classes.docstring:
Tests for CLI diff-context delta functionality.

This is where delta mode provides REAL savings - diff-context includes
code bodies, so skipping unchanged code saves significant tokens.

methods.name: git_python_project
methods.docstring: Create a temporary git Python project for diff-context testing.

methods.name: test_diff_context_with_session_id_first_call
methods.docstring: First diff-context call with session_id should include full code.

methods.name: test_diff_context_with_session_id_second_call
methods.docstring: Second diff-context call with same session_id should mark unchanged symbols.

methods.name: test_diff_context_delta_saves_tokens
methods.docstring: Delta mode should save tokens by omitting unchanged code.

methods.name: test_diff_context_no_delta_disables_caching
methods.docstring: --no-delta should disable delta mode even with session-id.

functions.name: _run_tldrs
functions.docstring: Run tldrs CLI and return result.

functions.name: temp_python_project
functions.docstring: Create a temporary Python project for testing.
